name: ffmpeg-studio
description: Visual FFmpeg editor for filters, preview, timeline organization and batch rendering
author: FFmpeg Studio Contributors

scripts.build: npm run typecheck && npm run build:bundle
scripts.dist: npm run prepare:ffmpeg-bin && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win
scripts.dist:portable: npm run prepare:ffmpeg-bin && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win portable
scripts.dist:installer: npm run prepare:ffmpeg-bin && npm run build && electron-builder --config electron-builder.json --win nsis
